title: Portfolio OS
description: An interactive Windows-like desktop portfolio built with vanilla JavaScript, featuring draggable windows, file management, and responsive design.

title: Audi Car Wash Tracker
description: Professional vehicle tracking system for Audi dealerships. Features real-time status updates, drag-and-drop interface, and role-based access control.

title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Modern e-commerce solution with shopping cart, payment integration, inventory management, and admin dashboard.

title: Weather Dashboard
description: Real-time weather application with interactive maps, 7-day forecasts, and location-based alerts using multiple weather APIs.

title: Chat Application
description: Real-time messaging platform with private and group chats, file sharing, emoji support, and typing indicators.

title: Code Snippet Manager
description: Developer tool for organizing and sharing code snippets with syntax highlighting, tagging, and search functionality.

title: Fitness Tracker
description: Mobile-first fitness app for tracking workouts, nutrition, and progress with charts and goal setting.

title: Blog CMS
description: Headless content management system for blogs with markdown support, SEO optimization, and analytics.
